About Sir Adam de Molins, Lord of Sefton and Speke
Vivian de Molines, by his wife Siwards, had issue of Adam, Dominus de Sefton, Lancashire, who married Annota, sole daughter and heir of Benedict de G …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Molyneux於1107年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親Vivian de Molyneux36歲，母親Sywarde23歲。他於1131年與Annora de Gernet在英國藍卡爾斯培可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1162年2月15日在英國藍卡爾斯培可享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Molyneux于1107年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲Vivian de Molyneux36岁，母亲Sywarde23岁。他于1131年与Annora de Gernet在英国藍卡爾斯培可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1162年2月15日在英国藍卡爾斯培可享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Molyneux was born in 1107, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, Vivian de Molyneux, was 36 and his mother, Sywarde, was 23. He married Annora de Gernet in 1131, in Speke, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 February 1162, in Speke, Lancashire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Molyneux est né en 1107, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Vivian de Molyneux, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Sywarde, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Annora de Gernet en 1131, à Speke, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 février 1162, à Speke, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Molyneux 1107 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vivian de Molyneux 36 und seine Mutter Sywarde 23. Er hat 1131 in Speke, Lancashire, England Annora de Gernet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Februar 1162 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Speke, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Molyneux è nato il nel 1107 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Vivian de Molyneux, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Sywarde, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Annora de Gernet nel 1131, nel Speke, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 febbraio 1162, nel Speke, Lancashire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Molyneuxが1107年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Vivian de Molyneuxは36歳，母Sywardeは23歳であった。1131年にイギリスランカシュアイアスペクでAnnora de Gernetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1162年2月15日にイギリスランカシュアイアスペクで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Molyneux(이)가 1107년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vivian de Molyneux(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Sywarde(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1131년 영국 랭카실르 스p크에서 Annora de Gernet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 2월 15일 영국 랭카실르 스p크에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Molyneux nasceu em 1107, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Vivian de Molyneux, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Sywarde, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Annora de Gernet em 1131, em Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1162, em Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Molyneux родился в 1107 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Vivian de Molyneux было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Sywarde, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Annora de Gernet в 1131 г. в местности спек, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 февраля 1162 г. в местности спек, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Molyneux nació en 1107, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Vivian de Molyneux, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Sywarde, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Annora de Gernet en 1131, en Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1162, en Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
